nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms. Some of the storms could produce heavy rain. Cloudy. Low around 60, with temperatures rising to around 62 overnight. East wind around 18 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between 1 and 2 inches possible.

nws.name: Sunday
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely before 2pm. Some of the storms could produce heavy rain. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 72. East northeast wind around 18 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between 1 and 2 inches possible.

nws.name: Sunday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly cloudy. Low around 54, with temperatures rising to around 57 overnight. Northeast wind 5 to 17 mph.

nws.name: Monday
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny, with a high near 77. East northeast wind around 6 mph.

nws.name: Monday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy, with a low around 58. Southeast wind around 6 mph.

nws.name: Tuesday
nws.shortForecast: Mostly Sunny then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers between 1pm and 4pm, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly sunny, with a high near 79. South southeast wind 3 to 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws.name: Tuesday Night
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 61. Southwest wind 3 to 7 mph.

nws.name: Wednesday
nws.shortForecast: Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Mostly Sunny
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 7am. Mostly sunny, with a high near 80. West northwest wind 6 to 10 mph.

nws.name: Wednesday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy, with a low around 57. North northwest wind 2 to 10 mph.

nws.name: Thursday
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny, with a high near 79. North northwest wind around 3 mph.

nws.shortForecast: Partly Cloudy then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms after 1am. Partly cloudy, with a low around 59. East wind around 3 mph.

nws.name: Friday
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms. Partly sunny, with a high near 80. Southeast wind 5 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph.

nws.name: Friday Night
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 66. Southeast wind around 9 mph, with gusts as high as 18 mph.

nws.name: Saturday
nws.shortForecast: Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Partly Sunny
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 7am. Partly sunny, with a high near 86. Southeast wind 9 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph.
